name: Chesterfield County Public Schools
about: Chesterfield County Public Schools serves approximately 64,000 students in Chesterfield County, Virginia, a suburban community south of Richmond. The district is known for its strong academic programs and community partnerships.
calendarNotes: Chesterfield County Public Schools serves the Richmond metro's largest suburban county, located south and west of the city. The school year starts in late August, though the exact start date may differ slightly from neighboring Henrico County or Richmond City Public Schools. Spring Break usually falls in late March. Families coordinating schedules with relatives in the Richmond metro should verify break dates across districts, as they can occasionally differ. The district covers a mix of dense suburban communities near Richmond and more rural southern areas — transportation and extracurricular logistics vary significantly by school location.
